title: Bartoline Border & Overlap Adhesive 250g,for 10m Border Wallpaper Adhesive for Decorative Borders & Vinyl, Fixes Seams & Repairs Ripped Wallcoverings, Fast-Drying & Strong Hold
features: EFFICIENT COVERAGE: A 250g tub covers approximately 10m x 13cm of border, providing sufficient adhesive for typical wallpaper and border installations. A little goes a long way, making it a cost-effective solution for most home decorating projects.

HIGH GRAB & FAST HOLD: Designed with high grab properties, this wallpaper adhesive provides a quick and strong bond for fixing decorative borders and vinyl wallcoverings, ensuring the borders stay in place with minimal shifting.

EASY TO APPLY: Simply apply the adhesive evenly along the length of the border using a brush or spatula; ensures smooth application with no mess, allowing borders to easily slide into position on interior surfaces.
VERSATILE USE FOR REPAIRS: Not just for borders; it’s ideal for fixing seams, reattaching torn wallcoverings, and making quick repairs to damaged areas. Great for quick fixes around the house.

SIMPLE CLEANUP & STORAGE: Keep your tools clean with water immediately after use; store the adhesive in a cool, dry place away from frost for long-term use. Prevent accidental spills by wiping off any excess adhesive with a damp sponge.
